series_metadata.series_description: These files are meeting minutes from the Banking Commission. The meetings of the Banking Commission are held as required by the Superintendent of the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, State Archives. ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility two (2) years from date of meeting ; Electronic: electronic files two (2) years from date of meeting
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Archives ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
